mapper.sql: due_diligence_id, project_id, project_name, report_title, due_diligence_content, finance_conclusion, legal_conclusion, market_conclusion, overall_conclusion, attachments, dd_status, process_instance_id, leader_id, leader_name, start_time, finish_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: SELECT FROM due_diligence WHERE due_diligence_id = #{dueDiligenceId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO due_diligence ( project_id, project_name, report_title, due_diligence_content, finance_conclusion, legal_conclusion, market_conclusion, overall_conclusion, attachments, dd_status, process_instance_id, leader_id, leader_name, start_time, finish_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{reportTitle}, #{dueDiligenceContent}, #{financeConclusion}, #{legalConclusion}, #{marketConclusion}, #{overallConclusion}, #{attachments}, #{ddStatus}, #{processInstanceId}, #{leaderId}, #{leaderName}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE due_diligence
project_id = #{projectId}, report_title = #{reportTitle}, due_diligence_content = #{dueDiligenceContent}, finance_conclusion = #{financeConclusion}, legal_conclusion = #{legalConclusion}, market_conclusion = #{marketConclusion}, overall_conclusion = #{overallConclusion}, attachments = #{attachments}, dd_status = #{ddStatus}, process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId}, finish_time = #{finishTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE due_diligence_id = #{dueDiligenceId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete:
UPDATE due_diligence SET del_flag = '2' WHERE due_diligence_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM due_diligence WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
